channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Haaland is not just Norway's talisman, but also th...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: In a different timeline, Erling Haaland might have played for England, but the man has become the avatar for Norway and, in many ways, the tournament as a whole.

item.title: A tale of two No. 10s: England's Bellingham, Norwa...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: At first glance, Jude Bellingham and Martin Ødegaard are vastly different. But both have been maligned and questioned recently, and are now on top form.

item.title: Register to get PVC before July 24, Kano NDC candidate urges residents
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Kano NDC candidate urges residents, especially youth and women, to complete their PVC registration online before the July 24 deadline for 2027 elections.
Read More: https://punchng.com/register-to-get-pvc-before-july-24-kano-ndc-candidate-urges-residents/

item.title: Former captain Knight announces England retirement
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Heather Knight will retire from international cricket after the Rothesay Test match between England and India at Lord's this week.

item.title: 2027: Reject godfatherism, political criminality, Kwara NDC urges voters

item.description:
Ahead of the Kwara 2027 election, the NDC urges voters to reject godfatherism and incompetent leadership, advocating for credible candidates and good gover

item.title: Wike steps in as AEDC moves to restore power after Maitama substation invasion
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to the electricity distribution company, Wike has been fully briefed on the circumstances surrounding the invasion of the critical power facility and is working with relevant authorities to ensure electricity is restored as quickly as possible.

item.title: Eno, PDP spokesperson, others celebrate ex-Gov Emmanuel at 60
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Mr Emmanuel turned 60 on Saturday, drawing glowing tributes from former aides, a PDP factional spokesperson and supporters, who praised his leadership, humility and enduring influence. The post Eno, PDP spokesperson, others celebrate ex-Gov Emmanuel at 60 appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Warsh and US Inflation Will Set Tone for July Fed Decision
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Kevin Warsh is about to make his first appearance before Congress as Federal Reserve chairman, and during two days of testimony he’ll have new US inflation data to parse with lawmakers.

item.title: McIlroy loses ground as fog halts play with Fitzpatrick sharing lead
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Rory McIlroy was slipping out of contention as Matt Fitzpatrick took a share of the lead when play was suspended due to fog in the third round of the Genesis Scottish Open.

item.title: Peter Obi will be alive to contest, lose 2027 election — Dave Umahi
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: We all want him alive to contest this election and watch himself lose again,” the minister said. The post Peter Obi will be alive to contest, lose 2027 election — Dave Umahi appeared first on Tribune Online.

According to a statement signed by the Police Public Relations Officer, SP Du

item.title: More than 1 million evacuated as Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in China
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Chinese authorities evacuated more than 1.7 million people as of Saturday as Typhoon Bavi made landfall in the country's eastern province of Zhejiang. Hundreds of flights have also been cancelled, and some high-speed railway services have been halted. Bavi is the second typhoon to impact China in ju

item.title: Peller, Jarvis set date for wedding
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Popular Nigerian TikTok creators Hamzat Habeeb Adelaja, popularly known as Peller, and Amadou Elizabeth Aminata, also known as Jarvis, have announced that their white wedding will take place on August 1, 2026. The post Peller, Jarvis set date for wedding appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Nigeria qualify for 2026 FIFA U17 Women’s World Cup finals
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Nigeria’s U17 girls, Flamingos, left nothing to chance as they defeated the Amazons of Benin Republic 5-3 in Lome on Saturday to make sure of a place at this year’s FIFA U17 Women’s World Cup finals. The win earned them victory over two legs on 8-5 aggregate. Akeem Busari’s side confirmed their qual

item.title: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The United States has called on Iran to publicly commit to reopening the Strait of Hormuz and guarantee unrestricted passage for commercial vessels as fresh diplomatic efforts begin in Oman to ease tensions in the Gulf. The renewed push comes as Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi arrived in Musc

item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei says vengeance is "inevitable" for the killing, which happened on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Thousands gather in Srebrenica to mark 31 years since genocide
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Ten newly identified victims were buried as the more than 8,000 Bosnian Muslim men and boys killed were remembered.

item.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One story
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The New York Times said on Saturday that the US Department of Justice had ​ordered several of its journalists to testify before a federal grand jury after they reported on security concerns involving President Donald Trump's new Qatari-donated Air Force One.

item.title: The CCTV footage that brought down hit-and-run London driver, now he’s in jail
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The incident occurred on March 16, 2024, in Ilford, where Mohammed Furuk Ahmed had briefly parked his vehicle to deliver food. As he attempted to cross the road, he was struck by a Range Rover travelling at between 64 and 68 miles per hour—more than twice the legal speed limit.

item.title: Holders St Mirren start with win as Linlithgow cause shock
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Holders St Mirren start the defence of the Premier Sports Cup with a comfortable 4-0 win over Dumbarton as second-tier Greenock Morton suffer a shock defeat at home to Lowland League champions Linlithgow Rose.

The qualification was confirmed on Saturday, July 11, following an exciting 5-3 victory over Benin R

item.title: Notorious bandit commander, Kachalla Sani Yellow eliminated
item.dc:creator: Daily Post

Yellow was reportedly responsible for coordinating several attacks along the Anka–Bagega Road. He was killed during an armed confrontation inv

item.title: Noskova Outclasses Muchova To Win Wimbledon Title
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Czech youngster Linda Noskova was at her best form as she recovered from missing five championship points to beat Karolina Muchova in Saturday’s Wimbledon final. The 21-year-old ninth seed blew five championship points in the second set before holding her nerve to secure a 6-2, 5-7, 6-3 victor

item.title: President Federation Cup: El-Kanemi Warriors claim fourth title with win over Ikorodu City
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: El-Kanemi Warriors claimed the President Federation Cup after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Ikorodu City in Asaba on Saturday. Muktar Ismail scored the decisive goal from the penalty spot in the 13th minute. It was El-Kanemi Warriors’ second President Federation Cup title in the last&#16

Adams died just weeks after featuring for his country at the Wo

item.title: Population vs. Planning: How Cape Verde built a World Cup blueprint Africa cannot ignore
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Cape Verde arrived at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as the tournament's smallest nation by population. It left as one of its defining stories. This feature explores how a nation of just over half a million people built a team capable of challenging the world's elite—and why its journey offers timely lesso

item.description: Linda Noskova sealed her maiden Grand Slam title as she became the third Czech women's Wimbledon champion in four years with victory over compatriot Karolina Muchova on Saturday - but only after overcoming a major wobble.

item.title: Ijebu Obas endorse Yayi for Ogun Governor, back Abiodun’s Senate bid
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Speaking on behalf of the 56 monarchs that make up the council, the Orimolusi of Ijebu-Igbo, Oba Lawrence Jaiyeoba Adebajo, said the traditional rulers unanimously resolved to support Adeola because of what they described as his remarkable contributions to infrastructure development and other interv

item.title: Noskova defeats fellow Czech Muchova to win first Wimbledon title
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Noskova, who banked the winner's prize of £3.6 million ($4.8 million), has emerged as one of the rising stars of the women's game during her remarkable run at the All England Club. The post Noskova defeats fellow Czech Muchova to win first Wimbledon title appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Ladoja lauds Tinubu, security operatives on release of Oriire kidnapped victims
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Olubadan of Ibadanland, Oba Rashidi Adewolu Ladoja, has commended President Bola Tinubu, security agencies and local hunters for their roles in The post Ladoja lauds Tinubu, security operatives on release of Oriire kidnapped victims appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Edo LG Poll: Voter apathy deepens as youths play football, traders shun exercise
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Several youths in Benin metropolis on Saturday shunned the Edo State local government election, opting to play football instead, as voter apathy and low turnout characterised the exercise across many polling units in the state. DAILY POST reports that the youths, who are of voting age, sai

item.title: Noskova Defeats Compatriot Muchova In Dramatic Final, Wins First Wimbledon Title
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Noskova, who banked the winner's prize of £3.6 million ($4.8 million), has emerged as one of the rising stars of the women's game during her remarkable run at the All England Club. The post Noskova Defeats Compatriot Muchova In Dramatic Final, Wins First Wimbledon Title appeared first on Channels Te

item.title: 'Naive' England toil in Women's Test as India dominate at Lord's
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England are facing an almighty battle to avoid defeat in the first Women's Test at Lord's after India dominated day two of the four-day fixture.

item.title: ‘Every Nigerian should register, obtain National Identity Number’ — Remi Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu, has called on Nigerians who are yet to register for a National Identity Number (NIN) to do so, saying accurate population records are essential for effective national planning and improved service delivery. In a message to mark this year’s World Popu

item.title: Gov. Yusuf Congratulates VP Shettima on Emergence as Tinubu’s 2027 Running Mate
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kano State Governor, Abba Kabir Yusuf, has congratulated Vice President Kashim Shettima on his emergence as the running mate to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for the 2027 presidential election. The governor paid a courtesy visit to the Vice President on Friday night at Aguda House in the Presidential

item.title: Osun: Police begin probe of viral video of Ibuaje
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Osun State Police Command has commenced an investigation into a viral social media video showing a building in the Ibuaje Community of Osogbo, following concerns raised by its content and circulation online. In a statement issued on Saturday by the Police Public Relations Officer, DSP

item.title: President Federation Cup: El-Kanemi Warriors Beat Ikorodu City To Win Fourth Title
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: El-Kanemi Warriors were crowned champions of the 2026 President Federation Cup after edging Ikorodu City 1-0 in a tense final at the Stephen Keshi Stadium, Asaba, on Saturday. The decisive moment came in the 13th minute when Muktar Ismail calmly converted from the penalty spot, a goal that ultimatel

item.title: How to Hide from Killer Drones
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.economist.com/science-and-technology/2026/07/08/how-to-hide-from-killer-drones Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48874357 Points: 47 # Comments: 34

item.title: World Cup: Morocco goalie says Messi ‘capable of producing miracles’
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Morocco goalkeeper, Yassine Bounou has expressed admiration for how Lionel Messi carried Argentina following a missed penalty against Egypt in the World Cup Round of 16, saying the 39-year-old is still "capable of producing miracles" despite his age The post World Cup: Morocco goalie says Messi &#82

item.title: China 1-1 Nigeria: 4 takeaways from Golden Eaglets’ showing in four-nation invitational
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Nigeria’s under-17 team, the Golden Eaglets, settled for a 1-1 draw against China in their final match of a four-nation invitational tournament, Soccernet.ng reports. ​Expectations were high for the squad, managed by former Sporting Lagos Academy boss, Eboboritse Uwejamomere, but the team failed to

item.title: US, Lebanese delegations meet to discuss Israeli ‘pilot zones’ withdrawal
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Sources tell Al Jazeera that talks are focused on establishing mechanism for first of two so-called "pilot zones".
